headline: Assessing Coterra Energy (CTRA) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why Coterra Energy (CTRA) is on investors’ radar Coterra Energy (CTRA) has attracted attention after a stretch of positive share performance, with gains over the past week, month, and past 3 months prompting closer scrutiny of the underlying business. See our latest analysis for Coterra Energy. At a share price of $33.97, Coterra Energy’s recent 7 day share price return of 5.66% and 90 day share price return of 33.85% sit alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 22.33%.
